title:
Nabeel S. Qureshi on X: "Well, this is a first: a ChatGPT-generated story won a prestigious literary prize (The Commonwealth Prize).

"Not X, not Y, but Z" sentences everywhere, the "hums" trope, and plenty of other obvious markers of AI writing. 

A major milestone for AI, at any rate...

title: Two types of ancient human ancestors coexisted more than 2 million years ago, fossils show | CNN
description: Fossilized teeth show that two different kinds of ancient human ancestors coexisted more than 2 million years ago. One of them may be an unknown species.
